narrative:
12 Ohio Senate district has 225,338 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.3 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -14.1% D−R vs -33.4% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
